title: Voxel Performance
description: Game optimization modpack for much better FPS
body:
![logo of Voxels Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42557d131ce7835258da94237d4af9b1a0a4946d.png)Welcome to Voxels Performance this is game optimizing modpack
We would love to listen to your ideas to improve

1. Modpack is mostly about fixing Performance Problems of minecraft
2. The modpack will have support from 1.20.1 to newer versions
3. If you have found any bug please report it to us

# ✅ Hardware Compatibility
We support all type of brands of CPU/GPU     
Amd/Intel intergrated graphics will work
For best performance we recommend Nvdia gpus

### .Intel HD Graphics 500 Series or newer
### .Nvidia Gtx 1630 or newer older ones will work but not as good
### .Amd Radeon HD 7000 Series or newer

# ❓How to Access support
You can join the discord server and go to the ticket channel and report issues


# ⚙️Issues
Your framerate lowerpercentages will be wrong but dont worry it will be fixed
If at higher chunks then 32 see performance issuse change the chunks in nvidium

# 🔨Information 

The config on the modpack is the best and most stable for performence

For best performance your nvidium chunks should be 12 higher then your normal chunks

You can turn on fps counter in extras in video options the normal F3 will drop your fps

# ⌚Schedule

The updates of the modpack depends on our group and time to make new versions
